reason: The Shining’s creeping dread burrows deep into your psyche
The Silence of the Lambs delivers chilling psychological terror
Psycho sets the gold standard for slow-burn, skin-crawling horror
Evil Dead II blends camp and genuine creepiness under your skin
Cape Fear builds tension that lingers long after it’s over
A Nightmare on Elm Street makes sleep itself a haunting threat
Wolf stalks you with primal, uncanny suspense

Pocahontas’s darker woods scenes evoke brooding dread
